title: Don Black
compiled_truth: Don Black is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-21), Don Black sent 20 and received 1349 emails, totalling 1369 interactions. Top correspondents: [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (7), [Eric Bass](people/eric-bass) (5), [D  Steffes](people/d-steffes) (5), [Tracee Bersani](people/tracee-bersani) (4), [Ilan Caplan](people/ilan-caplan) (4). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, credit_issues, deleted_items, inbox, personal.
timeline:
